hook_en: Spot the difference in just a glance!
key_message: Greek yogurt with fruit is a healthier choice than flavored yogurt loaded with sugar and additives.
visual_elements: flavored yogurt label with sugar content highlighted
spoonful of sugar next to donut
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Greek yogurt with fresh fruit vs. PROCESSED: Flavored yogurt cups (sugar, artificial colors, carrageenan) — Flavored yogurts can have 20-25g sugar per serving — as much as a donut

hook_en: What's really in your yogurt cup? Let's reveal!
hook_es: ¿Qué hay realmente en tu yogur? ¡Vamos a revelarlo!
key_message: Flavored yogurts can have as much sugar as a donut, making Greek yogurt with fruit a healthier alternative.
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Greek yogurt with fresh fruit vs. PROCESSED: Flavored yogurt cups (sugar, artificial colors, carrageenan) — Flavored yogurts can have 20-25g sugar per serving — as much as a donut
